title: escallonia pulverulenta var. resiniflua
intro: Escallonia pulverulenta var. resiniflua is a species of flowering plant in the Escalloniaceae family, commonly known as the Red Escallonia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Escallonia pulverulenta var. resiniflua include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and potentially lowering cholesterol levels. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in aromatherapy due to its fragrant leaves.
